creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

Telnet uses port 23, not port 21.  I suspect this is the cause of your problems. 
In general, these days, you probably don't want to be running a telnet server 
anyway, even if it is firewalled - expecially when your firewall rules simply 
denies all connections to it from anywhere, there is no point in running the 
server. 

You also have a spelling mistake in your rules: "ayy" should be "any".
